summary: Complete testing of km_adjustments dynamic extraction feature. All 52 backend tests pass (20 original + 32 new comprehensive tests). API endpoint GET /api/sci/residuals returns correct km_adjustments structure with all 9 terms for both 18k and 12k km categories. Frontend correctly uses getKmAdjustment function.
critical_code_review_comments: parse_general_rules() in pdfplumber_parser.py correctly extracts km adjustments from General Rules section using TOC-based page detection
_expand_term_range() correctly handles all term range formats: '24-27', '36-42', '48-54', '60'
DEFAULT_KM_ADJUSTMENTS provides valid fallback if extraction fails
GET /api/sci/residuals merges dynamic km_adjustments from file if available (lines 76-83 in sci.py)
Frontend getKmAdjustment() in leaseCalculator.ts correctly returns 0 for 24k km (standard) and adjustment values for 18k/12k
seed_data_creation: Using existing test PDFs (pdf_source.pdf for February, march_2026.pdf for March)
context_for_next_testing_agent: km_adjustments dynamic extraction fully tested. Backend parser extracts from General Rules section. API returns correct structure. Frontend uses getKmAdjustment() function correctly.

parse_general_rules_february_pdf.result: Extracts correct km adjustments from pdf_source.pdf with source='extracted'

parse_general_rules_march_pdf.result: Extracts correct km adjustments from march_2026.pdf with source='extracted'

GET_api_sci_residuals_km_adjustments.result: Returns km_adjustments with adjustments.18000 and adjustments.12000, each with 9 terms

DEFAULT_KM_ADJUSTMENTS_fallback.result: Valid fallback structure with all 9 terms for both 18k and 12k
